case_title: SINAI MEMORIAL CHAPEL VS CIRONE, MICHELE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,990.53 FILED BY SINAI MEMORIAL CHAPEL AS TO DEFENDANT CIRONE, MICHELE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-13-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SINAI MEMORIAL CHAPEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CIRONE, MICHELE $1,990.53 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,030.53 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO DEF. RETURNED NOT AT THIS ADDRESS.
